description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that scans buses for high or low values of voltage magnitude. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = set_vltscn(status, vhi, vlo) ierr, status,vhi,vlo = set_vltscn()
python_syntax: ierr = set_vltscn(status, vhi, vlo) ierr, status,vhi,vlo = set_vltscn()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: vhi
parameters.description: High voltage threshold. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: vlo
parameters.description: Low voltage threshold. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

error_codes.description: invalid specification of VHI and VLO.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
